description: Create a new SLD style named 'river_casing' in the 'ne' workspace for the 'ne:ne_rivers' layer with scale-dependent rendering and a cased line effect. For scales greater than 1:35,000,000, use a simple line (color #4292c6, width 1.0). For scales less than or equal to 1:35,000,000, implement a cased line with an outer stroke (color #08306b, width 4.0) and an inner stroke (color #deebf7, width 2.0) drawn on top. At this regional scale, include labels using the 'name' attribute in Arial size 12, color #08306b, following the line. Set 'river_casing' as the default style for the 'ne:ne_rivers' layer. Generate a WMS GetMap PNG image showing the effect in South America (BBOX=-70,-35,-50,-15) and save it to /home/ga/output/rivers_regional.png.
